title: DB migration: guild_states/channel_states/members tables in store.rs
description:
What: Add new SQLite tables for guild/channel state model to relay/src/store.rs.

Algorithm:
1. Read /home/mark/PROJECT/Agora/relay/src/store.rs — find Store::new() and the existing CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS blocks
2. After the existing tables (users, subscriptions, key_packages, hpke_keys, offline_messages, groups, group_members), add:

   a) guild_states table:
      guild_cid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,  -- CIDv1 of genesis GuildState
      guild_name TEXT NOT NULL,
      owner_did TEXT NOT NULL,
      created_by TEXT NOT NULL,
      state_json TEXT NOT NULL,    -- full signed GuildState JSON
      seq INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
      created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
      updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))

   b) guild_members table:
      guild_cid TEXT NOT NULL,
      member_did TEXT NOT NULL,
      joined_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
      PRIMARY KEY (guild_cid, member_did)

   c) guild_admins table:
      guild_cid TEXT NOT NULL,
      admin_did TEXT NOT NULL,
      granted_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
      PRIMARY KEY (guild_cid, admin_did)

   d) channel_states table:
      channel_cid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,  -- CIDv1 of genesis ChannelState
      guild_cid TEXT NOT NULL,
      channel_path TEXT NOT NULL,
      channel_name TEXT NOT NULL,
      channel_type TEXT NOT NULL,   -- 'text', 'voice', 'category'
      mode TEXT NOT NULL,           -- 'interactive', 'community', 'broadcast'
      mls_group_id TEXT,            -- null for broadcast channels
      state_json TEXT NOT NULL,     -- full signed ChannelState JSON
      seq INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
      created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
      updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
      CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_channel_path ON channel_states(guild_cid, channel_path)

   e) channel_members table:
      channel_cid TEXT NOT NULL,
      member_did TEXT NOT NULL,
      joined_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
      PRIMARY KEY (channel_cid, member_did)

   f) mls_group_mapping table:
      mls_group_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
      channel_cid TEXT NOT NULL,
      created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))

3. Add these Store methods (new impl block or same impl block):

   pub async fn create_guild(&self, guild_cid: &str, owner_did: &str, created_by: &str, name: &str, state_json: &str) -> Result<()>
   pub async fn get_guild(&self, guild_cid: &str) -> Result<Option<String>>  -- returns state_json
   pub async fn list_guilds_for_member(&self, member_did: &str) -> Result<Vec<String>>  -- returns guild_cids
   pub async fn add_guild_member(&self, guild_cid: &str, member_did: &str) -> Result<()>
   pub async fn remove_guild_member(&self, guild_cid: &str, member_did: &str) -> Result<()>
   pub async fn is_guild_member(&self, guild_cid: &str, member_did: &str) -> Result<bool>
   pub async fn add_guild_admin(&self, guild_cid: &str, admin_did: &str) -> Result<()>
   pub async fn is_guild_admin(&self, guild_cid: &str, admin_did: &str) -> Result<bool>
   pub async fn create_channel(&self, channel_cid: &str, guild_cid: &str, path: &str, name: &str, channel_type: &str, mode: &str, mls_group_id: Option<&str>, state_json: &str) -> Result<()>
   pub async fn get_channel_by_path(&self, guild_cid: &str, path: &str) -> Result<Option<String>>  -- returns state_json
   pub async fn list_channels(&self, guild_cid: &str) -> Result<Vec<String>>  -- returns channel_cids
   pub async fn register_mls_group(&self, mls_group_id: &str, channel_cid: &str) -> Result<()>

Defensive rules:
- All INSERT use INSERT OR IGNORE to be idempotent
- All queries parameterized (, , ...) — never string-interpolate user input
- No unwrap(); all sqlx errors propagated via ?

After changes run: cargo check -p agora-relay 2>&1
Report: pass/fail and list of new table names + new method signatures.
acceptance_criteria: cargo check -p agora-relay exits 0; all 6 new tables present in Store::new(); all new Store methods compile
